## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or safer alternatives.

## Safety and Privacy Notes

Does this touch brokerage data, local files, AI requests, API keys, or trading
actions?
